raw_response:
I agree with the selection of Option D as it correctly highlights a key feature of RSBY—ensuring no out-of-pocket expenditures for eligible BPL families during hospitalization. However, adding another point could further clarify that under RSBY, patients have flexibility beyond just government hospitals; they can seek treatment from both public and private sector providers listed in the network. Thus, my additional rationale supports the comprehensive nature of services covered under RSBY.
